member.summary: Static factory methods for creating API responses.

member.summary: Creates a successful API response.
member.param: The response data.
member.typeparam: The type of data in the response.

member.summary: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.
member.typeparam: The type of data being returned.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.ApiResponse`1.Data
member.summary: Gets or sets the response data.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient
member.summary: Base class for API clients that provides common HTTP operations and error handling.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Polly.ResiliencePipeline{System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BaseApiClient class.
member.param: The HTTP client to use for API requests.
The logger for this client.
Optional resilience pipeline. If null, a default pipeline is created.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.HttpClient
member.summary: The HTTP client used for making API requests.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logger
member.summary: The logger for this API client.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.JsonOptions
member.summary: JSON serialization options for request/response handling.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Pipeline
member.summary: The Polly resilience pipeline for resilient HTTP requests.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.GetAsync``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a GET request and deserializes the response.
member.typeparam: The type to deserialize the response data to.
member.param: The API endpoint to call.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.PostAsync``2(System.String,``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a POST request and deserializes the response.
member.typeparam: The type of the request data.
The type to deserialize the response data to.
member.param: The API endpoint to call.
The request data to send.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.summary: Performs a PUT request and deserializes the response.
member.typeparam: The type of the request data.
The type to deserialize the response data to.
member.param: The API endpoint to call.
The request data to send.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.DeleteAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a DELETE request.
member.param: The API endpoint to call.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.DeleteAsync``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends an HTTP DELETE request to the specified endpoint and returns the deserialized response data.
member.typeparam: The type of the response data expected from the API.
member.param: The URI of the endpoint to which the DELETE request is sent. Cannot be null or empty.
A that can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The deserialized response data of type returned by the API.
member.exception: Thrown if the API response data is null.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.GetCollectionAsync``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a GET request that returns a collection and handles empty responses gracefully.
member.typeparam: The type to deserialize the response data to.
member.param: The API endpoint to call.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The deserialized response data or an empty collection if null.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.PostFormAsync``1(System.String,System.Net.Http.HttpContent,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a POST request with FormData and deserializes the response.
member.typeparam: The type to deserialize the response data to.
member.param: The API endpoint to call.
The FormData content to send.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.CreateDefaultPipeline
member.summary: Creates a default resilience pipeline with retry and timeout for resilient HTTP requests.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.MakingGetRequest(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Making GET request to endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Debug" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.MakingPostRequest(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Making POST request to endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Debug" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.MakingPutRequest(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Making PUT request to endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Debug" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.MakingDeleteRequest(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Making DELETE request to endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Debug" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.SuccessfullyRetrievedData(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Successfully retrieved data from endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Debug" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.SuccessfullyPostedData(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Successfully posted data to endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Debug" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.SuccessfullyUpdatedData(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Successfully updated data at endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Debug" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.SuccessfullyDeletedData(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Successfully deleted data at endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Debug" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.SuccessfullyRetrievedCollection(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Successfully retrieved {Count} items from endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Debug" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.ApiResponseDataNull(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "API response data is null for endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Warning" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.HttpRequestFailed(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Logs "HTTP request failed for endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Error" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiClient.Logs.DeserializationFailed(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Logs "Failed to deserialize response for endpoint: {Endpoint}" at "Error" level.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiController
member.summary: Base controller that provides standardized API response wrapping.

member.summary: Returns a 200 OK response with data wrapped in ApiResponse.
member.typeparam: The type of the data payload.
member.param: The data to include in the response.

member.summary: Returns a 201 Created response with data wrapped in ApiResponse.
member.typeparam: The type of the data payload.
member.param: The URI of the newly created resource.
The data to include in the response.

member.summary: Returns a 201 Created response with data wrapped in ApiResponse.
member.typeparam: The type of the data payload.
member.param: The URI of the newly created resource.
The data to include in the response.

member.summary: Returns a 201 Created response with data wrapped in ApiResponse.
member.typeparam: The type of the data payload.
member.param: The action name to use for generating the Location header.
The data to include in the response.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.BaseApiController.CreatedAtAction``1(System.String,System.Object,``0)
member.summary: Returns a 201 Created response with data wrapped in ApiResponse and a Location header generated from the specified action and route values.
member.typeparam: The type of the data payload.
member.param: The action name to use for generating the Location header.
The route values to use for generating the Location header.
The data to include in the response.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdHandler
member.summary: DelegatingHandler that appends the correlation ID header to outgoing HTTP requests if available in the current HttpContext.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IHttpContextAccessor)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The to access the current HttpContext.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdHandler.SendAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends the HTTP request and appends the correlation ID header if available in the HttpContext.
member.param: The HTTP request message to send. The correlation ID will be set on this request if available in the HttpContext.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the send operation that produces the HTTP response message.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware to capture or generate a correlation ID from request headers and store it in HttpContext.Items.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdMiddleware.CorrelationIdHeader
member.summary: The HTTP header name used to carry the correlation ID.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdMiddleware.CorrelationIdItemKey
member.summary: The key used to store the correlation ID in .

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The next middleware in the request pipeline.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Invokes the middleware to capture or generate a correlation ID.
member.param: The for the current request. This context is used to read the correlation ID from headers or generate a new one if not present.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task will complete when the next middleware in the pipeline has been invoked.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdMiddlewareExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for the CorrelationIdMiddleware.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdMiddlewareExtensions.UseCorrelationId(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Registers the CorrelationIdMiddleware in the ASP.NET Core request pipeline.
member.param: The to register the middleware with.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdMiddlewareExtensions.GetCorrelationId(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Gets the correlation ID from HttpContext.Items, if present.
member.param: The current to read from.
member.returns: The correlation ID if present; otherwise, .

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CorrelationIdMiddlewareExtensions.SetCorrelationId(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the correlation ID header on an outgoing .
member.param: The outgoing HTTP request message.
The correlation ID to set on the request.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CursorPaginatedResponse`1
member.summary: Cursor-based paginated response wrapper for API endpoints. Provides stable pagination using opaque cursors instead of offset-based pagination.
member.typeparam: The type of items in the page.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CursorPaginatedResponse`1.Items
member.summary: The items for the current page.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CursorPaginatedResponse`1.NextCursor
member.summary: Opaque cursor for retrieving the next page of results. Null if no more pages are available.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CursorPaginatedResponse`1.PreviousCursor
member.summary: Opaque cursor for retrieving the previous page of results. Null if this is the first page.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CursorPaginatedResponse`1.HasNextPage
member.summary: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CursorPaginatedResponse`1.HasPreviousPage
member.summary: Indicates whether there is a previous page of results.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CursorPaginatedResponse`1.PageSize
member.summary: The number of items requested for this page.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CursorPaginatedResponse`1.RequestId
member.summary: The request ID for tracking.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.CursorPaginatedResponse`1.Timestamp
member.summary: The timestamp when the response was generated.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.PaginatedResponseExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for .

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.PaginatedResponseExtensions.MapItems``2(BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.PaginatedResponse{``0},System.Func{``0,``1})
member.summary: Maps the items of a paginated response from one type to another using the specified mapping function.
member.typeparam: The type of the items in the source paginated response.
The type of the items in the resulting paginated response.
member.param: The source paginated response containing items of type to be mapped.
A function that defines how to map each item of type to type .
member.returns: A new containing the mapped items and the same pagination metadata as the source.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.PaginatedResponse`1
member.summary: Generic paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.
member.typeparam: The type of items in the page.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.PaginatedResponse`1.Items
member.summary: The items for the current page.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.PaginatedResponse`1.HasNextPage
member.summary: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.PaginatedResponse`1.PageNumber
member.summary: The current page number (1-based).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.PaginatedResponse`1.PageSize
member.summary: The number of items per page.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.PaginatedResponse`1.TotalCount
member.summary: The total number of items across all pages.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.API.PaginatedResponse`1.TotalPages
member.summary: The total number of pages.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection
member.summary: Direction for cursor-based pagination.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection.Forward
member.summary: Forward pagination - get items after the cursor.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection.Backward
member.summary: Backward pagination - get items before the cursor.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorHelper
member.summary: Helper utility for encoding and decoding cursors used in cursor-based pagination. Cursors are opaque strings that encode position information for stable pagination.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorHelper.EncodeCursor(System.DateTimeOffset,System.String)
member.summary: Encodes a cursor from a timestamp and ID combination.
member.param: The timestamp component of the cursor.
The ID component of the cursor.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorHelper.DecodeCursor(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a cursor to extract the timestamp and ID components.
member.param: The base64-encoded cursor string.
member.returns: A tuple containing the decoded timestamp and ID.
member.exception: Thrown when the cursor format is invalid.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorHelper.CreateNextCursor``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,System.DateTimeOffset},System.Func{``0,System.String})
member.summary: Creates a next cursor from a collection of items.
member.typeparam: The type of items.
member.param: The collection of items.
Function to extract timestamp from an item.
Function to extract ID from an item.
member.returns: The encoded cursor for the last item, or null if no items.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorHelper.CreatePreviousCursor``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,System.DateTimeOffset},System.Func{``0,System.String})
member.summary: Creates a previous cursor from a collection of items.
member.typeparam: The type of items.
member.param: The collection of items.
Function to extract timestamp from an item.
Function to extract ID from an item.
member.returns: The encoded cursor for the first item, or null if no items.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorHelper.IsValidCursor(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a cursor string is properly formatted.
member.param: The cursor to validate.
member.returns: True if the cursor is valid, false otherwise.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.IQueryablePaginationExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for IQueryable pagination.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.IQueryablePaginationExtensions.Sort``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDescriptor})
member.summary: Applies sorting to the specified based on the provided sort descriptors.
member.typeparam: The type of the entities in the query.
member.param: The query to which sorting will be applied. Cannot be .
A collection of objects that define the sorting criteria. Each descriptor specifies the property to sort by and the sort direction. Cannot be .
member.returns: A new with the specified sorting applied. If is empty or contains no valid descriptors, the original query is returned unmodified.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.IQueryablePaginationExtensions.TakeAsync``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PageSpec,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies pagination and sorting to the query based on the provided .
member.typeparam: The entity type.
member.param: The source query.
The pagination specification.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The modified query with pagination and sorting applied.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PageSpec
member.summary: Page parameters for offset-based pagination (bound from querystring via page.* keys).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PageSpec.Number
member.summary: The current page number (1-based).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PageSpec.Size
member.summary: The requested page size.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec`1
member.summary: Query specification for HTTP querystring binding with offset pagination, sorting, and typed filters.
member.typeparam: The type that represents custom filters for the query (e.g., a record or DTO).

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec`1.DefaultPageSize
member.summary: Default page size when none is specified.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec`1.MaxPageSize
member.summary: Maximum allowed page size. Consumers may clamp values above this limit.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec`1.Page
member.summary: Page parameters bound from querystring using the page.* prefix (e.g., page.number, page.size).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec`1.Filter
member.summary: Typed filter payload bound from the filter.* prefix (e.g., filter.status).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec`1.SortDescriptors
member.summary: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec`1.Normalize
member.summary: Returns a new instance with normalized pagination and sanitized sort string.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec`1.ToQueryString(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Builds a querystring that reproduces this specification when bound by ASP.NET Core.
member.param: Whether to prefix with '?' (default: true).

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec`1.ToQueryStringValue
member.summary: Builds a instance representing this specification.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.QueryableSortExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for applying sorting to queryables using a provided sort mapping.
Placeholder Sort extension. Applies sorting using the provided mapping. Currently a no-op; implementation to be added.
member.typeparam: The read model type.
member.param: The source query.
The sort descriptors.
Mapping of logical sort fields to key selectors.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDescriptor
member.summary: Describes a single sort operation against a logical field.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDescriptor.#ctor(System.String,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDirection)
member.summary: Creates a new .
member.param: Logical field name to sort by.
Sort direction.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDescriptor.Field
member.summary: Logical field name to sort by. Mapping to actual data model is responsibility of the consumer.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDescriptor.Direction
member.summary: Sort direction.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDescriptorsModelBinder
member.summary: Binds a comma-separated sort string into a list of SortDescriptor. Supported tokens: "-field", "field", and "field:asc|desc".

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDescriptorsModelBinder.BindModelAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ModelBinding.ModelBindingContext)
member.summary: Binds a comma-separated sort string into a list of .
member.param: The model binding context.
member.returns: A task that completes when binding is done.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDescriptorsModelBinderProvider
member.summary: Provides a model binder for of .

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDirection
member.summary: Sort direction for a field.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDirection.Asc
member.summary: Ascending sort order.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.SortDirection.Desc
member.summary: Descending sort order.
